It shifted into the gaming business with the purchase of Caesars Palace on the Las Vegas Strip in 1969, selling off the restaurants and changing its name. The company was acquired in 2005 by Harrah's Entertainment, which later took on the Caesars Entertainment nam...

retrieved_doc_snippets.title: Xinjiang University
retrieved_doc_snippets.text: Xinjiang University | Xinjiang University (XJU) (, ) is one of the major universities in the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region, People’s Republic of China, and is a national key university.  Established in 1924 in Urumqi, Xinjiang University is a comprehensive university with the highest academic level in Xinjiang, under Project 211.

retrieved_doc_snippets.title: Xinjiang Normal University

retrieved_doc_snippets.title: Xinjiang Medical University
retrieved_doc_snippets.text: Xinjiang Medical University | Xinjiang Medical University (XMU) (; ), formerly the Xinjiang Medical College, is a medical university in Ürümqi, the capital of the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region of the People's Republic of China.  It was ratified by the National Ministry of Education in 1998 and entitled by Jiang Zemin.
